description: Unified MCP server for semantic knowledge management in Obsidian. Three modes: LUCA (pure graph, no embeddings), PRIZMA (semantic classification, core_mix, drift detection), SLOI (strict 5-level DAG hierarchy). Runs 100% locally with LM Studio, Ollama, or any OpenAI-compatible embedding API. Key tools: suggest_metadata, suggest_parents, recalc_signs, recalc_core_mix, get_children, get_parents, index_all.
